item.title: 数据与行业智能平台
item.summary: 把数据、行业知识和 AI 工作流结合为持续运营能力的范式。

updates.event: 36% of enterprises intend to keep best-of-breed standalone retrieval tools, compared with 21% who plan to consolidate onto a provider's native context stack

evidence.source_quote: a plurality of enterprises (36%) say they intend to keep best-of-breed standalone tools rather than consolidate onto a provider’s native context stack — well ahead of the 21% who plan to consolidate

updates.event: 58% of enterprises either run a governed semantic layer in production (25%) or are piloting and building one (34%)

evidence.source_quote: Well over half of enterprises (58%) either run a governed semantic layer in production (25%) or are piloting and building one (34%)

updates.event: 57% of enterprises reported that in the past six months their AI agents produced confident but wrong answers traced to missing or inconsistent business context

evidence.source_quote: A majority of enterprises (57%) report that in the past six months their AI agents produced confident but wrong answers they traced to missing or inconsistent business context

facts.statement: 36% of enterprises intend to keep best-of-breed standalone retrieval tools, compared with 21% who plan to consolidate onto a provider's native context stack
58% of enterprises either run a governed semantic layer in production (25%) or are piloting and building one (34%)
57% of enterprises reported that in the past six months their AI agents produced confident but wrong answers traced to missing or inconsistent business context

item.html:
已积累 45 条可追溯记录；以下仅展示最近24小时中最值得战略关注的更新。
